assumptions: Scope = Fixes 1, 2, 8 from the plan; Fixes 3, 4, 5-7 deferred to separate features.

Fix 1 includes a new state.json schema for unresolved_concerns carry-forward: stored under stages.<stage>.unresolved_concerns as a list of {id, severity, summary, source_review, raised_at, addressed_at, addressed_by}; written when judges vote advance with open concerns; verified-cleared by the next stage's checkpoint runner reading and requiring each id be either marked addressed or explicitly deferred in annotations[].
Fix 1 reseals the manifest at advance time when artifact SHA has drifted, and records the drift (old_sha, new_sha, reason) in stages.<stage>.annotations[].
Fix 2 regex uses structural anchoring — start-of-line + specific finding-block prefixes — to avoid false-positives from prose that mentions HIGH in passing. Negative-case tests required.

Fix 8 self-check runs as a post-command hook after checkpoint/judge/reconcile/auto-reconcile; writes a WARN to state.json under invariant_warnings[] and prints the contradiction message to stdout; does not abort the command.
Regression test uses a captured state.json snapshot from feature run 033; task 0 of tasks.md is 'capture and commit the snapshot to scripts/tests/fixtures/'.
Out of scope: changes to sync-codex-skills.py, review-lens scripts, reviewer prompts, product-surface changes, any PgBoss/scheduler changes.
discovery.summary: Discovery carried in from skeptical-TL review of docs/workflow/plans/feature-factory-runner-fixes.md. Scope is Fixes 1, 2, 8 only; Fixes 3, 4, 5-7 explicitly deferred. No new questions needed — assumptions captured via --assumption flags. If implementation surfaces ambiguity in the unresolved_concerns schema, block for human decision.
acceptance_criteria: Run-033 state.json snapshot committed as a test fixture; regression test replays it and asserts advance is honored.
factory_next_action honors judge_next_action='advance' and routes to next stage action instead of repair_<stage>_checkpoint, including when artifact SHA has drifted.
unresolved_concerns carried from stage N to stage N+1 in state.json under a documented schema; next stage's checkpoint verifies they are addressed or deferred.
detect_actionable_findings catches numbered-list, heading, bold-prefix, and inline Severity: shapes; does not false-positive on prose mentioning HIGH.
Post-run self-check emits a WARN and console message when judge_next_action==advance contradicts recommended_next_action==repair_<same stage>_checkpoint.
